prompt: I have a Laravel 11 API project (no frontend, just REST endpoints). It uses PostgreSQL and Redis for queues. I want to deploy it on Railway but I have no Dockerfile or railway.toml yet. My .env file has APP_KEY and DATABASE_URL hardcoded. Can you set everything up for me?

assertions.description: Dockerfile creates and uses a non-root user
Multi-stage build with a separate Composer install stage
railway.toml is created with DOCKERFILE builder
Security report flags the hardcoded .env secrets
Next steps for railway up are provided
